titleStmt.title: SII 28.304: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 304. (A.R. No. 458 of 1913.) TAḌĀVŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records that the temple of Tiruvēkambam-uḍaiya-nāyanār of Mēl-Gaṅgappāḍi alias Tiḍāvār in Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam in Milāḍu alias Jaṉaṉāthavaḷanāḍu was structured in stone (tirukkaṟṟaḷi-tiruppaṇi) with the help of gold ornaments of the temple, part of it presented by donors earlier and the rest (20 kaḻañju in weight) presented (at 10 kaḻañju each) by Nāyaṉār (the king) and his junior queen (iḷaiya-pīrāṭṭiyār). The responsibility for this work was undertaken by one individual, who was Śrī-māhēśvara-kkaṇkāṇi-āṇḍār of the temple, ūrār, dēvakanmi and accountant of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvanaccakkaravaṟtikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭi
yaṉai muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiṉa kulottuṅka coḻa
tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 7vatu milāṭākiya jaṉaṉātavaḷanāṭṭu
Āṟṟūrkūṟṟattu melkaṅkappāṭiyāṉa tiṭāvūr Uṭaiyār tiruvekampamuṭai
ya nāyanār koyil tirukkaṟṟaḷi tiruppaṇikku yiṉṉāyanār tiruvāparaṇam māna
paṭṭam muṉṉāḷil pirākkaṇapaṭṭam munnāḷil kulottuṅka kova rāyar Iṭṭa paṭṭam
Iraṇṭināl kāciṭai poṉ Eṇkaḻañce mukkāleyaraikkālum māṟṟu Āṇikkiḻ E
ṭṭum ciṟupuli veḷār coḻiya taraiyar Uḷḷiṭṭār palaru Iṭṭa piṭavārikkā ḻi Arai
kkālu kiḻ nāḷpilacilluruvāna poṉ kāciṭai Aiṅkaḻañcey mukkāle muppatumāvum
māṟṟu Āṇikkiḻ Eḻarai Ākappon patiṉnāṟkaḻañce mukkāle mañcāṭiyu miraṇṭu māvum nā
yanār Iṭṭa paṭṭam Oṉṟināl kalliṭai pon patinkaḻañcum nampirāṭṭiyāril Iḷaiya nampirāṭṭi
yār yiṭṭa paṭṭam kalliṭai poṉ pattum Ākappoṉ muppattu ṉāṟkaḻañce mañcāṭiyum Iraṇ
ṭu mā Ital
ṭai poṉ patiṉāṟ kaḻañce mukkāle pattu māvum tirukkaṟṟaḷi
ṭṭu ti piṉpu tirumaṇṭapattukku kalliṭai poṉ Irupatiṉkaḻañcum I
ṭṭu tiruppaṇi ceyvittom Ikkoyillil śrīmāhe[ śvara]
kkaṇkāṇi Āṇṭār Aruvūruṭaiyāṉ perumāḷ civatavanappe
rumāḷāna civaṉikkiniyān pa m Ūrārum Ikkoyillil tevakaṉmi ko
yil kaṇakkaṉum Ikkoyillil tānattārum yipponniṭṭu I tiruppa
ṇi ceyvittom .
Digital edition of SII 28.304 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
